mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, icon, cover, category, follow_count, post_count, is_hot FROM topic WHERE is_hot = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY follow_count DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, name, description, icon, cover, category, follow_count, post_count, is_hot FROM topic WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
